Early morning wintry mix transitions to rain quickly. Heavy rain and interior snow will impact the afternoon/evening commute.

President Donald Trump holds his 9th cabinet meeting at the White House.

byNBC 10 NEWS

This week – A breaching whale crashes onto a boat near the New Hampshire coast, the Duchess of York tours a Newport art exhibit and -- in case you missed it -- the 2024 Olympics kick off with opening ceremonies in Paris.



Westerly man pays for stranger's haircut during difficult time

Dan Nelson of Westerly gets his haircut at Rios Barbershop. (WJAR)

A Westerly resident is being praised for an act of kindness shown at Rios Barbershop.

30-year-old patron Dan Nelson overheard a conversation between 61-year-old Mario Turco Jr. of Boston and another barber about the recent death of Turco’s 87-year-old mother, Harriet Turco.

Nelson was touched by Turco’s story andpaid for his haircutwithout telling him.

“I couldn’t believe somebody did that for me out of a random act, and not knowing who I was," said Turco.

“It wasn’t meant to be a big thing or anything like that, but just to hear that he really did appreciate it, that was the best part for me," said Nelson.



Whale capsizes boat off coast of New Hampshire

A whale breaches and lands on a boat. (Colin Yager)

Awhale capsized a boatoff the coast of Rye, New Hampshire Tuesday.

The incident was captured on video by 16-year-old Colin Yager of Eliot.

The boaters were pulled out of the water and onto another boat.

The Coast Guard says there were no injuries to the boaters or the whale.



WaterFire Providence to end shows early amid financial struggles

Artists perform during a WaterFire show along the Providence River. (WJAR)

WaterFire shows will end at 11 p.m. instead of midnight this summeras the organization faces financial troubles.

Organizerssaid the biggest cost is the payroll at $2 million, and they have cut the number of lightings and special activities by about 40 percent.

The non-profit hopes individual donors will come forward to support the Rhode Island staple.



Duchess of York visits elephant migration exhibit in Newport

Duchess of York, Sarah Ferguson visits the Ocean State. (WJAR)

Duchess of YorkSarah Ferguson visited the campus of Salve Regina UniversityThursday to tour the elephant migration exhibit.

A red elephant at the exhibit was inspired by the duchess and her famous red hair.

She told NBC 10 that the exhibit’s message about conservation and protecting the planet is important to discuss.



Paris Olympics open with sprawling ceremony

Smoke in the colors of the France flag are set off in Paris, France, at the start of the opening ceremony for the 2024 Summer Olympics, Friday, July 26, 2024. (AP Photo/Bernat Armangue, Pool)

Paris kicked off its first Summer Olympicsin a century on Friday despite suspected acts of sabotage that targeted France's high-speed rail network.

Crowds watched along the River Seine as Olympic teams paraded in boats along the waterway in the rain.

Olympic organizers estimated that 6,800 of the 10,500 athletes were in attendance.

2025Sinclair, Inc.
title: ICYMI: A whale capsizes a boat, a Duchess visits Rhode Island and the Paris Olympics begin
description: A whale breaches and lands on a boat, the Duchess of York tours a Newport art exhibit, and the  Paris Olympics kick off with opening ceremonies.
